title: Blackmoor Dish Drainer Rack/Detachable Cutlery Holder and Removable Draining Board Drip Tray/Durable and Space Saving for Kitchen Counter/Black or Chrome Design / 49 x 19.5 x 32.5 cm (Black)
features: DISH DRAINER - Keep your kitchen organised and clutter-free with this efficient dish drainer, designed to maximise drying space while saving valuable counter space. The sturdy wire rack securely holds up to 10 plates, with additional room for bowls, cups, and other kitchen essentials—making it an ideal choice for small kitchens or homes with limited workspace.

INNOVATIVE SWIVEL SPOUT - Designed to keep your worktop dry and mess-free, this dish drainer features a removable draining board with a concave centre to catch excess water. The 360° swivel spout directs water straight into the sink, preventing unwanted pooling on the countertop and ensuring a tidy and hygienic drying area.

NON-SLIP PLUS CUTLERY ORGANISER - The detachable three-compartment cutlery holder includes a dedicated knife slot, allowing for the safe and organised drying of knives, forks, spoons, and other utensils. The main wire rack is reinforced for stability and has four silicone leg covers, providing non-slip support to keep the dish drainer firmly in place.

DURABLE FOR DAILY USE - Crafted from high-quality iron wire with a powder coating, this dish drainer is built to withstand daily use while securely holding up to 10kg of kitchenware. Despite its compact design, it offers ample drying space, making it perfect for everyday use. No tools are required for assembly, and the removable drip tray and cutlery holder help you maintain a fresh, hygienic, and well-organised kitchen.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market-leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials, and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
